channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: herry2059/project-os-for-codex
item.description: Open-source control plane for Codex projects: Git-backed context, visible agent progress, scoped MCP access, resumable work, and safe handoffs. — ⭐103, TypeScript

item.title: pueschel88/Tradingview-MCP
item.description: Tradingview MCP server for controlling Tradingview Desktop from Claude Code via Chrome DevTools Protocol — ⭐51, TypeScript

item.title: sher1096/klinepic-agent-api-examples
item.description: Tested MCP server, MCPB, Docker, and OpenAPI for annotated post-trade candlestick charts from broker or exchange fills. — ⭐20, JavaScript

item.title: Brokenwatch24/crowdmind
item.description: Desktop app for building AI persona panels and testing stimuli against them (Electron + React + TypeScript) — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: oyekamal/claude-code-flow-visualizer
item.description: 🔍 Visualize any Claude Code agent harness — CLAUDE.md, subagents, skills, commands, hooks & MCP servers — as an interactive flow graph. Import from GitHub, ZIP, or local folder. 100% client-side. — ⭐6, JavaScript

item.title: vidhyampp/MCP-Test-Framework
item.description: AI-augmented Playwright + pytest framework for testing MCP servers and UI flows, with optional self-healing, visual triage, fuzzing, and flaky-test analysis. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: michaelellis003/paperboy
item.description: MCP server that delivers research papers to your e-reader — Zotero as the source of truth. Search, discover, queue, and send to Kindle/Kobo from Claude. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: mergeos-bounties/rviz-mcp
item.description: rviz-mcp — MCP server for RViz2 displays, frames, and views (mock + live) for AI agents — ⭐3, Python

item.title: mergeos-bounties/ros2-mcp
item.description: ros2-mcp — MCP server for AI agents to inspect and control ROS2 (mock + live CLI bridge) — ⭐3, Python

item.title: NobleMajo/explorer-mcp
item.description: explorer-mcp is a lightweight, read-only MCP server that gives AI quick access to repos, folder structures, and context, cutting exploration time and tokens. — ⭐3, Go

item.title: stanislawherjan1/gdocs-comments-mcp
item.description: MCP server for adding inline, range-anchored comments to Google Docs — the one comment operation the Google Docs & Drive APIs can't do. For AI agents (Claude, Cursor, Copilot) that review documents. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: xfloukiex-lab/pandaclip
item.description: One local-first MCP server for agent working state — clipboard history & snippets, TTL cache, file-organizer overlay, and a knowledge graph — plus a live desktop activity lens. 40 tools, SQLite everyw — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: Dragkob/MCPhantom
item.description: MCPhantom is a local web dashboard for MCP endpoint recon. Discover resources, templates, tools, and prompts, then interact with them from a security console. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: AIOProductOS/studio-mcp
item.description: AIOProductOS Studio — MCP server that turns your AI host into a product videographer: scripted recordings of your own web app (smooth cursor, zooms, captions, branded transitions) + marketing-grade sc — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: TaplioOfficial/taplio-linkedin-mcp
item.description: Taplio LinkedIn MCP Server: draft, schedule, publish, and analyze your LinkedIn posts from any AI assistant (Claude, Cursor, and more). Remote MCP server at mcp.taplio.com. — ⭐3, n/a

item.title: aoreshkov/kotlin-lib-mcp
item.description: MCP server exposing the sources, public API and KDoc of Maven-published Kotlin/Java libraries — ⭐3, Kotlin

item.title: chadru/assessor-lookup-public
item.description: API-first county assessor record lookup, MLS discrepancy checks, and a local MCP server for appraisers. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: rwnalds/engram
item.description: Self-hosted MCP server + dashboard giving Claude Code, Cursor & Hermes agents shared long-term memory over a git-backed markdown vault. Agent-native, Obsidian-compatible second brain — markdown RAG, n — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: whoisqwerz/pocket_disasm
item.description: Multi-session IDALib MCP router for coding agents. Analyze multiple binaries in parallel with IDA-compatible reverse engineering tools. — ⭐20, Python

item.title: yung13yubabie/line-summary
item.description: 在 Windows 上用 Claude Code 讀本機 LINE 電腦版聊天記錄、產生每日摘要的 MCP server（wxSQLite3/aes128cbc 解密） — ⭐18, Python

item.title: wassermanproductions/unofficial-davinci-mcp
item.description: Let any AI agent run DaVinci Resolve — MCP server with live Studio control, free-edition FCPXML/LUT workflows, reference color matching, beat-aware music cuts, dialogue tightening, broadcast-loudness — ⭐15, Python

item.title: ozankasikci/global-agent-memory
item.description: Local-first, project-aware memory MCP server for Claude Code, Codex, and other AI agents, with Obsidian and an owner dashboard. — ⭐10, Python

item.title: bkspace/starlight-mcp
item.description: MCP server for your Astro/Starlight docs — search_docs, get_doc, list_docs over stateless streamable HTTP. Astro integration + pure handler + Cloudflare glue. — ⭐7, TypeScript

item.title: amirdaraee/luxembourg-mcp
item.description: Keyless MCP access to official Luxembourg public data — 21 tools over 15 public systems, zero dependencies — ⭐6, Python

item.title: viRomulus-gif/browser-integration-mcp
item.description: MCP server for Claude Desktop - an isolated browser agent (Chrome/Edge/Vivaldi via CDP). Windows. — ⭐5, Inno Setup

item.title: LuiggiVal08/toon-memory
item.description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents using TOON format (40% fewer tokens than JSON) — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: abdugafforov-bobur/hackerone-mcp
item.description: MCP server connecting Claude to the HackerOne Hacker API — programs, scope, reports, hacktivity, payouts — ⭐4, Python

item.title: vibheksoni/session-export
item.description: Convert AI coding CLI sessions between Codex, Claude Code, Pi, and OpenCode, with SDK, CLI, and MCP chat history search. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: luke-fairbanks/broll
item.description: The content studio MCP for coding agents — BYO-key generation, deterministic video/carousel rendering, draft-first social publishing. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: clementrx/Performance-agent
item.description: Open-source AI Strength & Conditioning coach for your terminal. Runs in Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Codex — the LLM narrates, a deterministic engine calculates, and it won't lie about unrealistic goals — ⭐3, Python
